lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.
Good condition.

Get ready to drive home in this wonderful vehicle that's in good condition! It has been well-maintained and looks great, showing only minor signs of use that are typical for its age. This car is reliable, comfortable, and ready for many more miles of enjoyment with its next owner!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor rust spots. The interior shows signs of regular use, including fading and small stains on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are currently operational.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior paint still retains a deep shine, though you will find some minor stone chips on the front bumper and a few light surface scratches along the door edges from regular use. The interior is clean and smoke-free; the leather seats are in great shape with only minor creasing on the driver's side bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid, with a complete service history and recent oil change. All electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, are working perfectly. It offers a smooth ride and represents a well-maintained example of this model.

Having passed our rigorous quality standards, it serves as a testament to consistent care and remains in excellent operational standing for its next owner. Secure a sophisticated asset that balances premium performance with exceptional value.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been so reliable for me over the years! It runs like a dream and is just waiting for someone to take it on its next big adventure. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-revving Double VANOS. The chassis remains composed thanks to a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings. Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Routine maintenance complete. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic blend of reliability and style. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep shine, showing only the minor, expected character marks of a carefully driven car. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and high-functioning electronics, including the infotainment and climate control systems. Mechanically, the car is in strong form; it has a documented service history, recently passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, and has been treated to a fresh oil change and new filters. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts precisely, and the tires offer excellent grip for the seasons ahead. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been kept in a climate-controlled garage and treated with genuine care.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver. Combining mechanical integrity with a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. A definitive investment in both performance and reliability.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. The exterior finish and interior appointments remain in commendable condition, reflecting a history of responsible ownership. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a balance of premium features and proven durability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner right away! Perfect for someone looking for a reliable, stylish car without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Offered is a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This high-revving mill utilizes individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system to deliver linear power up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains composed thanks to a reinforced rear subframe and updated bushings, while the Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement. Power is managed through a factory variable M-differential lock. Recent service includes a valve clearance adjustment and cooling system overhaul, ensuring the mechanical integrity of this iconic platform. Minor cosmetic patina reflects its
Used vehicle in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive condition for its age. The exterior shines with a deep gloss, showing only the minor stone chips expected from responsible highway driving. Inside, you'll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin with supple leather and all electronics—including the dual-zone climate control and premium infotainment system—functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it is robust; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are seamless, and a recent inspection confirmed the brakes and suspension are in excellent working order. It has been garage-kept and comes with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records. This car strikes the perfect balance for a driver who wants a reliable, high-performing luxury vehicle without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which serves as a testament to engineering excellence and consistent stewardship. Demonstrating robust mechanical health and a refined aesthetic, this model represents a superior acquisition for the professional seeking both reliability and prestige. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety, offering a driving experience of distinguished quality.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle stands as a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking quality and reliability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly in great shape! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. It’s got a lot of life left in it and is just waiting for someone new to get behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin—I think you’re really going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is paired with a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-calibrated limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. Significant preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings to preserve chassis rigidity. The suspension retains its communicative MacPherson strut and multi-link geometry, while the braking system provides consistent bite with no fade. A mechanically sorted, analog performance machine that balances track-capable dynamics with grand touring civility.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a beautiful shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use like small stone chips. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of modern technology and safety features. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine starts eagerly, shifts are seamless, and the suspension provides a smooth, composed ride. It has a documented history of regular servicing, including a recent oil change and brake inspection. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s still got plenty of life left? This car has been so good to me, and it's in really solid shape! It drives like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to take it on some fun road trips. It’s been well-loved and is ready to go today—come check it out!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s example, powered by the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 featuring a flat torque curve and an 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis dynamics are sharp, utilizing an aluminum-intensive multi-link suspension and an M-variable differential lock for optimal power delivery through the rear wheels. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring the double-VANOS system and valvetrain operate at peak efficiency. The M-DCT dual-clutch transmission provides crisp, rev-matched downshifts, while the rigid subframe and precise steering rack offer the communicative feedback expected from an M-division icon. A mechanically sound driver’s car with excellent structural integrity.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and care, presenting in well-maintained condition throughout. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of road use such as light stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the leather upholstery remains supple and supportive, and all electronic features—including the infotainment system and climate control—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a consistent service history that ensures a smooth, responsive drive and precise gear shifts. It has been smoke-free and garage-kept, preserving the integrity of the interior materials. This is a reliable, high-quality choice for a driver who values a car that has been treated with respect and diligence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it balances sophisticated performance with reliable longevity. The interior presents in excellent order, reflecting a history of attentive ownership. Fully inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and safety, this automobile offers exceptional value for those seeking a refined driving experience.
